news.title: Zscaler price target lowered to $280 from $345 at Oppenheimer
news.summary: Oppenheimer lowered the firm’s price target on Zscaler (ZS) to $280 from $345 on lower peer multiples, while keeping an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm notes Zscaler reported a solid Q2, beating on the top line, while delivering sequential gross and operating margin expansion. Management raised FY26 organic NNARR growth expectations and issued Q3 guidance ahead of consensus. news.title: Zscaler Airtel AI Security Center Opens As Valuation Discount Persists
news.summary: Zscaler (NasdaqGS:ZS) has launched an AI & Cyber Threat Research Center in partnership with Bharti Airtel. The center is focused on strengthening India's national cyber resilience and supporting trusted AI adoption. This marks a material expansion initiative for Zscaler outside of its regular quarterly earnings and guidance updates. news.title: Zscaler (ZS) Reports Record FQ2 2026 Revenue Driven by Massive Enterprise Adoption
news.summary: Zscaler Inc. (NASDAQ:ZS) is one of the stocks with explosive growth potential. On February 26, Zscaler reported FQ2 2026 financial results, with revenue reaching $816 million, a 26% year-over-year increase that exceeded market expectations. news.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Zscaler, Lowers Price Target to $195
news.summary: Citigroup  analyst Fatima Boolani   maintains Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $305 to $195.

news.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Zscaler, Lowers Price Target to $257
news.summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Gabriela Borges   maintains Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $290 to $257.

news.title: Why Zscaler (ZS) Stock Is Down Today
news.summary: Shares of cloud security platform Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) fell 14.9% in the afternoon session after the company reported mixed fourth quarter results. Sales and earnings per share came in ahead of expectations during the quarter.

news.title: Is It Worth Investing in Zscaler (ZS) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
